description: Product Description Aolso Travel Umbrella 6 Ribs Mini Umbrella The mini umbrella stand consists of 6 reinforced metal ribs and is therefore robust and durable. The umbrella handle is made of aluminum alloy with waterproof coating and dries quickly. Aolso Travel Umbrella Portable folding umbrella for men and women Folding umbrellas are made of thickened vinyl and 190T rubber film. The high-tech nanopolymer composite coating can block 95% of ultraviolet rays and other harmful sun rays, with UPF>50+. Mini travel umbrella can effectively block ultraviolet rays and prevent sunburn. Small and lightweight, it can be easily put in your handbag, backpack, suitcase, car, briefcase, etc., perfect for business trips, travel and daily life. A capsule box is included for convenient storage and transport. Foldable parasol Umbrella ribs: 6 strands Opening diameter: 90 cm Height: 52cm Umbrella handle: aluminum alloy Aolso Folding Mini Umbrella This mini travel umbrella looks stylish and is available in various bright colors. This umbrella is the perfect gift for yourself as well as your family, friends and colleagues.
